zh.Calais, France: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh.Ashwell Thorpe, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bourchier於大約1467年出生在英國艾可哈爾斯亞德時，他的父親Sir Humphrey Bourchier33歲，母親Elizabeth Tilney25歲。他於1497年11月8日與Katherine Howard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1533年3月19日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年67歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bourchier于大约1467年出生在英国艾可哈爾斯亞德时，他的父亲Sir Humphrey Bourchier33岁，母亲Elizabeth Tilney25岁。他于1497年11月8日与Katherine Howard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1533年3月19日在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年67岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bourchier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: perhaps a variant of   Burcher   (  see  Bircher  ). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2). The name has sometimes been altered to or confused with   Bouchier   and   Boucher  .

2 Norman, English: locative name of uncertain origin but it is presumably from a French place-name, perhaps Boursières in Haute-Saône. The name was early confused with other surnames and may survive in Bouchier, Bowcher, Bowser, and Boozer . The surname gave rise to a number of minor place-names in Essex: Bourchier’s alias Bouchier’s Hall in Aldham, Bourchier’s Hall in Messing; Bouchier’s Grange in Great Coggeshall, Bouchiers Chapel in Tollesbury, Boarstye Fm and Bowser’s Hall in Rivenhall (Essex), and Boose’s Green in Colne Engayne.

variants.name: Bourcier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Lucien, Armand, Emile.
French: variant of   Boursier   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourcier are descendants of Jean Boursier dit Lavigne from France (see Boursier ).

variants.name: Bircher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Albrecht, Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
South German and Swiss German: topographic name for someone who lived by a birch tree or in a birch wood, from Middle High German birche ‘birch’ + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.
English: habitational name from Birchover in Derbyshire or Bircher in Hereford, both named as from Old English birce ‘birch’ + ofer ‘ridge’.

variants.name: Bouchier
meanings: 1  English: variant of   Butcher  .
2  English: alternatively a variant of   Belcher  .
3  Norman, English: possibly a variant of   Bourchier   (2).

variants.name: Bowser
meanings: English: nickname from either from Old French beu cher ‘good company’, or from Old French beu sire ‘fair sir’ (see Belcher ), given either to a fine gentleman (perhaps ironically), or to someone who made frequent use of this term of address. Compare Bonser and Boozer .
English: variant of   Bolsover  .
Americanized form of German   Bauser  .

variants.name: Boozer
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German   Buser  .
English (Kent): variant of   Bowser   1.

variants.name: Burcher
meanings: English: variant of   Bircher  .

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Borger
meanings: North German (also Börger) and Dutch: variant of Burger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from Yiddish borger ‘borrower’ or ‘lender’.
Norwegian and Swedish: habitational name for someone from a place called Borg (see   Borg  ), or a topographic name for someone living by a fortification or near a hill resembling a fortification.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Bourchier was born about 1467, in Halstead, Essex, England, his father, Sir Humphrey Bourchier, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth Tilney, was 25. He married Katherine Howard on 8 November 1497. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 19 March 1533, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bourchier est né environ 1467, à Halstead, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Bourchier, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tilney, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Howard le 8 novembre 1497. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 mars 1533, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bourchier um 1467 in Halstead, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Humphrey Bourchier 33 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Tilney 25. Er hat am 8. November 1497 Katherine Howard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. März 1533 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bourchier è nato il circa 1467 nel Halstead, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Humphrey Bourchier, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tilney, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Howard il 8 novembre 1497. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 marzo 1533, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bourchierが約1467年にイギリスエセックスハルステアドで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Bourchierは33歳，母Elizabeth Tilneyは25歳であった。1497年11月8日にKatherine Howardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1533年3月19日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで67歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bourchier(이)가 대략 1467년 영국 에세스 할스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Bourchier(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tilney(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1497년 11월 8일 Katherine Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 3월 19일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bourchier nasceu aproximadamente 1467, em Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Bourchier, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tilney, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Howard em 8 de novembro de 1497. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de março de 1533, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bourchier родился около 1467 г. в местности холстид, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Bourchier было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tilney, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Howard 8 ноября 1497 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 марта 1533 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bourchier nació aproximadamente 1467, en Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Humphrey Bourchier, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tilney, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Katherine Howard el 8 de noviembre de 1497. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1533, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
